en: A: May I ask if Kivi is home?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: Is Vais at home, please?

ab: neka timadju, anema nu sikim tjaimadju?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?
A: Grandpa, I’m Vais, please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: ti Api aken, kemim aken tjanusun a kivangavang.
en: A: Kacaw, I’m Api, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: cuaicuai anga itjen a inika mecevung.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: ui lja! nasingelit aken tjanusun. idu ka sudjusudjui lja!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!
A: Please sit down and have some tea.
B: Thank you.
A: Please have some tea.
B:Your tea is delicious.
A: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: uii, sa sanguaq aravac nutja pacunan aicu a kudamunu.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: B: Yes! These fruits look great.
A: How is the fruit?
B:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: makesa anga sinan kaiven ni kina, idu kani anga!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: A: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
B: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: suliyavu a kemen, nuka sun a qaliqali.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: A: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: liyaw anga ravac aku kinan, mavedu aken aravac.
en: B: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: su liyavu a keman, maya masiyaq.
en: A: Eat more, don’t be polite.
B:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: uri vaik anga ken, ku kivalau anga nutjaivililj.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: salilim anga, uri vaik anga ken a tjumaq.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
A: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: uii, nuizua su zikang kivalau anga a sema tjanuamen.
en: B: Okay, come to my house sometime.
